Maria Bourn, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to SEP-11-2018 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY (CONTINUED)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-14-2018 Continued To May-16-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Gholanhosain Rasooli
Off Calendar Apr-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Plaintiff Kimberly Fisher's Motion to Compel the deposition of Defendant Rasooli and the Defendant's Opposition thereto having been duly considered and there appearing good cause therefor the motion to compel the deposition of Defendant Rasooli is hereby GRANTED. The court notes that the trial date is May 14, 2018 and as such the deposition of Defendant Rasooli shall take place no later than May 4, 2018. The Plaintiff's request for sanctions is hereby denied (CCP 2023.040). The Plaintiff shall prepare the ORDER in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and present it Judge Pro Tem Dianne Peebles for the Court's review and signature.

Judge Pro Tem: Dianne Peebles, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/JPT/HEK)

Plaintiff Kimberly Fisher Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Gholanhosain Rasooli (Advanced From 4/25/18 To 4/6/18 Per Ex Parte Order Of 4/2/18)
Off Calendar Apr-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances are made by or for any parties in the case.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

RULING: Plaintiff Fisher's motion to compel the deposition of Rasooli is GRANTED. Rasooli shall appear for his deposition no later than 10:00 a.m. on April 20, 2018 at the office of plaintiff's counsel located at 601 Van Ness Ave, San Francisco, CA 94102. The court DENIES Fisher's request for sanctions as there was no compliance with CCP 2023.040 [request for sanctions in notice of motion].

Counsel for Fisher is to prepare and submit a proposed order to the court for signature which complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR #6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (302/RBU)
